creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text: There's been a lot of changes to btx since this, and they have likely fixed this bug. ESX server 3.5 is also kinda hard to come by these days. This boot path works in many other VM systems with newer FreeBSD versions. If you can still reproduce this problem with FreeBSD 11 or 12 images, please file a new bug, and cc me so we can get to the bottom of it.
